terms_in_comments_only.context: * Wrap any AI-powered feature (plan wizard, protocol matches, retail attach)
terms_in_comments_only.surface: JSDoc comment — not rendered to users
terms_in_comments_only.fix: Update comment to 'Wrap any intelligence-gated feature'

paywall_copy_audit.notes: Model paywall copy. Feature lists use intelligence-first vocabulary throughout. CTA 'View Plans' is direct and appropriate.
Wrapper component with no independent copy.
Feature content is acceptable. CTA button 'Unlock for $29/mo' is the primary violation. Emoji icons are informal for a professional intelligence platform.

violations: Unlock unlimited analyses, retail attach, and opening order generation.
paywall_copy_audit.notes: limit_reached and no_subscription content are clean. pro_only sub-text uses 'Unlock' as marketing verb.

onboarding_copy_audit.notes: Model copy. Uses 'Market signals, treatment trends, and revenue intelligence — built for licensed pros.' No violations.
Precise role descriptions. 'This helps us tailor your intelligence experience.' uses platform vocabulary correctly.
Interest labels are domain-accurate. 'Revenue Optimization' is a user-stated interest category, not a platform promise — acceptable.
'Your intelligence feed is ready.' — correct activation framing. Primary CTA 'Go to Intelligence Hub' routes to core value. Best copy in onboarding sequence.

empty_state_copy_audit.notes: Base component has icon + title + optional description + optional action. Pearl Mineral V2 styled correctly.
Custom Pearl Mineral concentric-ring illustration. 'No matching signals' / 'No signals in this category' are specific and domain-accurate. No CTA is appropriate here.
Admin view-only pages. Accurate, informative titles and descriptions. No action button is appropriate for these surfaces.

Local EmptyState renders with zero props. No icon, no title, no body, no action. Does not meet Hub Feature Spec. Fix: use base EmptyState with icon, title, description, and action pointing to plan wizard.
Admin-internal tools. Single-line label is minimal but acceptable at current stage. Upgrade to base EmptyState before launch gate.

failures: FAIL-2: 'Unlock' as marketing verb on public pages — Education.tsx:410, HelpCenter.tsx:35, BrandStorefront.tsx:543
FAIL-3: 'Unlock' as CTA verb in paywall components — UpgradeGate.tsx:153, PaywallGate.tsx:226
FAIL-4: PlanResults.tsx blank EmptyState — no title, body, or action
WARN-1: UpgradeGate feature title copy uses 'Unlock' prefix across 4 variants
WARN-2: Admin tool EmptyStates use label-only pattern — upgrade before launch gate
pass_threshold: PASS requires 0 user-facing banned term violations per §9 STOP CONDITION
